content: {"vocabulary":[{"word":"chien","translation":"Hund","pronunciation":"ʃjɛ̃","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le chien est noir.","exampleTranslation":"Der Hund ist schwarz.","usageNote":"Der Chien ist ein Haustier. Er bellt."},{"word":"chat","translation":"Katze","pronunciation":"ʃa","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le chat dort sur le canapé.","exampleTranslation":"Die Katze schläft auf der Couch.","usageNote":"Die Katze ist weich. Sie miaut."},{"word":"oiseau","translation":"Vogel","pronunciation":"wazō","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"L'oiseau chante.","exampleTranslation":"Der Vogel singt.","usageNote":"Ein Vogel fliegt. Er hat Federn."},{"word":"poule","translation":"Henne","pronunciation":"puːl","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"La poule fait « cocorico ».","exampleTranslation":"Die Henne macht „Kikeriki“.","usageNote":"Die Henne legt Eier. Sie hat Federn."},{"word":"vache","translation":"Kuh","pronunciation":"vaʃ","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"La vache mange de l'herbe.","exampleTranslation":"Die Kuh frisst Gras.","usageNote":"Die Kuh gibt Milch. Sie ist groß."},{"word":"cheval","translation":"Pferd","pronunciation":"ʃəvɑl","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le cheval court dans le champ.","exampleTranslation":"Das Pferd läuft im Feld.","usageNote":"Das Pferd hat ein großes Maul. Es isst Heu."},{"word":"lapin","translation":"Hase","pronunciation":"lapɛ̃","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le lapin saute.","exampleTranslation":"Der Hase springt.","usageNote":"Der Hase hat lange Ohren. Er lebt im Wald."},{"word":"mouton","translation":"Schaf","pronunciation":"mu.tɔ̃","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le mouton a de la laine.","exampleTranslation":"Das Schaf hat Wolle.","usageNote":"Das Schaf ist weiß. Es frisst Gras."},{"word":"lion","translation":"Löwe","pronunciation":"ljɔ̃","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le lion rugit.","exampleTranslation":"Der Löwe brüllt.","usageNote":"Der Löwe ist stark. Er lebt in Afrika."},{"word":"éléphant","translation":"Elefant","pronunciation":"elefɑ̃","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"L'éléphant a une trompe.","exampleTranslation":"Der Elefant hat eine Rüssel.","usageNote":"Der Elefant ist sehr groß. Er lebt in Afrika und Asien."},{"word":"souris","translation":"Maus","pronunciation":"suʁi","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"La souris court vite.","exampleTranslation":"Die Maus läuft schnell.","usageNote":"Die Maus ist klein. Sie frisst Käse."},{"word":"poisson","translation":"Fisch","pronunciation":"pwasɔ̃","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le poisson nage dans l'eau.","exampleTranslation":"Der Fisch schwimmt im Wasser.","usageNote":"Ein Fisch hat Schuppen. Er lebt im Meer."},{"word":"serpent","translation":"Schlange","pronunciation":"sɛʁpɑ̃","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le serpent rampe.","exampleTranslation":"Die Schlange kriecht.","usageNote":"Die Schlange hat keine Beine. Sie ist lang."},{"word":"abeille","translation":"Biene","pronunciation":"abɛj","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"L'abeille butine.","exampleTranslation":"Die Biene sammelt Nektar.","usageNote":"Die Biene sticht. Sie fliegt."},{"word":"fleur","translation":"Blume","pronunciation":"flœʁ","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"La fleur est belle.","exampleTranslation":"Die Blume ist schön.","usageNote":"Eine Blume hat Farbe. Sie duftet."}]}
